hero.title: Crunch. Char. Repeat.
hero.description: Buttermilk chicken, flame-kissed tacos and loaded sides built fresh, packed properly and ready when you are.
hero.imageAlt: Fried chicken, tacos, burger, wings, loaded fries, wrap and shake on a bright table

products.title: Pick your craving
products.description: Big flavour, sharp sauces and proper portions. Go solo or turn it into a full yard feast.

items.name: The Yardbird
items.description: Crispy thigh, pickles, shredded lettuce and comeback sauce.
items.imageAlt: Crispy chicken burger with fresh toppings

items.name: Charred chicken tacos
items.description: Three corn tacos, salsa verde, slaw and lime crema.
items.imageAlt: Colourful chicken tacos with salsa and lime

items.name: Hot honey wings
items.description: Eight crisp wings, chilli honey and ranch dust.
items.imageAlt: Golden chicken wings with spicy glaze

feature.title: Fast food with standards.
feature.description: We brine overnight, bread in small batches and char every taco filling over flame. Sauces are made in-house and nothing waits under a heat lamp.
feature.imageAlt: Freshly assembled tacos with vibrant toppings

packages.title: Combos that make sense
packages.description: Choose the mood, pick a heat level and let us handle the rest.

items.name: Solo stack
items.description: A main, seasoned fries and any canned drink.

items.name: Full yard feast
items.description: The table-filling mix for friends who want everything.

items.name: Taco night
items.description: A shareable taco spread with fries and street corn.

gallery.title: Fresh out the kitchen
gallery.description: A moving line-up of crunch, colour, char and shake-worthy finishes.

rowOne.imageAlt: Fast-food spread with chicken and tacos
rowOne.caption: The full yard

story.title: Made fast. Never rushed.
story.description: Cluck & Yard began with a fryer, a taco press and an unreasonable obsession with crunch. We still prep every sauce, slaw and pickle in our Manchester kitchen.
story.imageAlt: Colourful selection of freshly made fast food
story.quote: If it doesn't drip a little, we haven't gone far enough.

process.title: Choose. Heat. Collect.
process.description: Ordering stays quick, whether you're at the counter or on the sofa.

steps.title: Pick it
steps.description: Choose chicken, tacos, burgers, wraps or a full combo.

steps.title: Set the heat
steps.description: Keep it mellow, go hot honey or ask for Yard Fire.

steps.title: We cook
steps.description: Your order is fried, grilled and dressed from fresh.

steps.title: Grab it
steps.description: Collect in store or follow live delivery tracking.

testimonials.title: The group chat approved
testimonials.description: Real reactions from local regulars and late-night feast crews.

items.quote: The chicken stayed audibly crunchy all the way home. Unreal.
items.name: Kai M.

items.quote: Proper tacos, sharp salsa and portions that are actually generous.
items.name: Sophie T.

items.quote: Our office lunch arrived hot, labelled and exactly on time.
items.name: Marcus J.

visit.title: Your nearest yard is ready.
visit.description: Order direct for collection or delivery. Large office orders can be scheduled by email.

footer.note: Big flavour from Manchester, made fresh every day.
